src/main/java/eu/kartoffelquadrat/bookst.general_idea: Added a new method to allow adding books to the assortment.
Simplified and updated the class-level Javadoc description.
src/main/java/eu/kartoffelquadrat/bookst.before: A DAO for indexed books. There can only be one Assortment. Assortment implementations should not have a public constructor, only be accessed as a singleton.
src/main/java/eu/kartoffelquadrat/bookst.after: Represents the catalogue of all indexed books.

src/test/java/eu/kartoffelquadrat/bookst.general_idea: Added imports for java.lang.reflect classes to support private constructor access.

Added a new test case to verify adding a new book to the assortment.
Added a new test case to verify that adding a book with an existing ISBN throws a RuntimeException.

Changed variable type from interface to implementation class to allow direct instantiation in subsequent tests.
Added a test case to verify the default constructor of BookDetailsImpl.
